title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: Verify that after accepting location tracking permissions during onboarding, the Poly Lens app does not re-prompt for permissions when accessing the FindMyDevice menu later.
steps: 1. Start the app for the first time.
2. Check the box for license agreement and privacy policy.
expected: Location tracking is now allowed for the Poly Lens app and the user is presented with further onboarding steps. When the user later wants to access the FindMyDevice menu, the app should not ask for permissions again.
